target: 6. I Will Accept Everything
Ah, there they are! Hizuru-san and Nezu-san!
Yeah. It looks like they'll make it out to the town soon.
*Pant, pant*… It's been a while since I ran like this.
Especially while carrying a girl like this.
It might have been tough… but I'm not going to thank you.
I don't need your thanks. I just didn't want the boy's resolve to go to waste, that's all.
You don't seem convinced.
…What should I do?
It's obvious. The foot of the mountain is just ahead. Just keep heading down to the town.
Do you really… think that's okay?
What are you trying to say?
Is this the only possible ending? Couldn't we have done something more?
Did Ryunosuke have to be sacrificed?
If I had more power, if I had the knowledge to overcome this situation, maybe I could have saved Ryunosuke.
And… Haine too…
Nagumo-sensei…
If you say that… then we…
(Can the past really not be changed…?)
(We knew the ending. And yet we still couldn't save Ryunosuke-san…)
(If anything, maybe our half-baked interference only made Nagumo-sensei suffer more.)
Look—
Just be quiet for a bit… I'm trying to gather my thoughts.
Hmph. Suit yourself.
…Straw. You're there, right?
Yes… I'm here.
If you're really a time traveler, won't you guide me?
To the best possible future.
Huh…?
Is it really okay for me… to just go back to town like this? Leaving Ryunosuke and Haine behind.
I know that's what Ryunosuke wanted…
But is this the ending you guys knew? Is it okay to end it like this?
Couldn't this end up bringing about an even worse future?
Hizuru-san…
They're still echoing in my ears. Ryunosuke's last words, and… Haine's cries of pain.
I don't want Ryunosuke's feelings to go to waste. But if there's even a slight chance of making a better future…
I won't hesitate anymore. Tell me, Straw, what should I do?
Shinpei… what do we do?
(It's not a question I can easily answer.)
(The best possible future for Nagumo-sensei… What kind of future is that, exactly?)
(Ryunosuke-san can't be saved anymore. And because of this incident, Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san will get involved with the shadows…)
(And 14 years later, they'll end up fighting the shadows again on this island.)
If we defeat Haine here… maybe we can avoid that future.
Wait… Shinpei. Did you just say defeat Haine?
Yeah, I don't know the exact reason, but… Haine seems to be regretting attacking Ryunosuke-san, and looks confused.
Either way, if we're going to defeat Haine, now is our chance while she's confused.
That might be true, but… we can't defeat Haine.
In the end, we might just end up sending Hizuru-san and Nezu-san right back to Haine, you know?
I know that. Besides, if we do that, there's no telling what will happen to our own future.
That's why we need to think carefully…
Straw, have you still not reached a conclusion?
Y-Yeah…
I promise. No matter what happens as a result of following your guidance, I will accept everything.
So please. I want you to guide me.
(Nagumo-sensei… do you really trust us that much?)
(Us, who just appeared out of nowhere and can only offer words…)
(To the point where you genuinely need my judgment this much…)
(If that's the case, then I'll—)
Nagumo-sensei…
"Please focus on surviving."
"Let's defeat Haine."
Right now, please focus on surviving. For the sake of Ryunosuke-san, who sacrificed himself.
I'm sure that's the choice that will lead to the best possible future.
I see…
(Even if right now is the perfect opportunity to defeat Haine…)
(We don't have a plan to defeat her for sure.)
(More than anything, I can't put Nagumo-sensei in any more danger.)
Let's defeat Haine.
The Haine right now is no longer the Haine who was your friend, Nagumo-sensei.
Besides… in the future we know, Haine will bring tragedy to this entire island.
Therefore—
Cut off the cause while we still can… Is that what you mean?
